## 🐛 Bug Description

Please describe the bug clearly and concisely.

<!-- What were you trying to do? What happened instead? -->

## 📋 Steps to Reproduce

1. In any mode in the bottom left 
2. Click on 'Next Button'
3. See the ' Nicely done! ' pop up
4. It shows the next correct answer

## 🎯 Expect
test_description_zh: 在任意练习模式下，观察底部左侧的'Next'按钮，点击该按钮后查看弹出的'Nicely done!'提示信息，检查提示信息中是否泄露了下一题的正确答案。
expected_result_zh: 点击'Next'按钮后弹出的'Nicely done!'提示中不应显示下一题的正确答案，仅应展示当前题目的反馈信息，不泄露后续题目答案。
